creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Sat May 31 05:24:11 2014
New Revision: 355936
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355936
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355936/

Log:
  - Stage support [1]
  - Update to 2.4.0 [1]
  - Reset maintainer to ports@
  
  PR:		190365 [1]
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> [1]

Deleted:
  head/math/rpy2/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/math/rpy2/Makefile
  head/math/rpy2/distinfo

Modified: head/math/rpy2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/rpy2/Makefile	Sat May 31 05:20:15 2014	(r355935)
+++ head/math/rpy2/Makefile	Sat May 31 05:24:11 2014	(r355936)
@@ -2,14 +2,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rpy2
-PORTVERSION=	2.3.6
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	math
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 
-MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Python interface to the R Programming Language
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/numpy:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-numpy \
 		R:${PORTSDIR}/math/R
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/numpy:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-numpy \
@@ -17,8 +18,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/numpy:
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%LOCALBASE%%|${LOCALBASE}|g' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
 

Modified: head/math/rpy2/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/math/rpy2/distinfo	Sat May 31 05:20:15 2014	(r355935)
+++ head/math/rpy2/distinfo	Sat May 31 05:24:11 2014	(r355936)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rpy2-2.3.6.tar.gz) = a834e54ed6b98e71ef674f96628ab68e17f614db5b6246a9560048493a69f81c
-SIZE (rpy2-2.3.6.tar.gz) = 186977
+SHA256 (rpy2-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 3cb6360d4d0af7996979f50d0347f5f74fc3fcf98e3ee8057c4c886b358d17e1
+SIZE (rpy2-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 160914
